name: @geminilight/mindos
description: MindOS — Human-Agent Collaborative Mind System. Local-first knowledge base that syncs your mind to all AI Agents via MCP.
author: GeminiLight

scripts.prepack: rm -rf _standalone && cd mcp && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../app && npm install --no-workspaces && ./node_modules/.bin/next build --webpack && cd .. && node scripts/prepare-standalone.mjs && rm -rf app/node_modules app/.next mcp/node_modules _standalone/node_modules
